title: Berserk Totem
description: Unleash a darker power. Replace your Totem of Undying with a demonic twist.
body:
### Beserk Totem is a resource pack that replaces the default Totem of Undying with a menacing, dark-themed design just like the brand of sacrifice from berserk.
![hand looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89760072555a5e689ed286562d968ac0437a51a6.png)

**You have to rename totem of undiying as "brand" on a anvil you can add anything after the word "brand" _not case sensitive_**

![inv Looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a6c96815cac4b7ea75c01da1feb4c3f06048ae8.png)

## **Note** : Variants-CIT Is Needed
